name: SIM Swapping / Telecom Identity Takeover Actors
description: SIM Swapping and Telecom Identity Takeover Actors are threat actors who gain control of a victim’s mobile phone number by convincing a telecom provider to transfer service to an attacker-controlled SIM or device.
